clean_justification: Both rubrics satisfied with no critical/important gaps. code-vs-spec: (a) Gap 1 (C-01) closed — graph.py:2278 sets deterministic_preview_response = preview_response, so the NO_PREVIEW sentinel passes through; downstream the response-is-not-None branch (2325) skips _emit_deflection_text for NO_PREVIEW (2326), leaves llm_call_count unchanged (no second LLM call), and serializes the sentinel at 2381 with skip_validators=True. The renderer (_render_turn1_preview_block, 1145-1206) emits NO `products` key in any composition branch, and empty blocks resolve to NO_PREVIEW via _is_empty_turn1_preview_block (1217-1228). (b) Gap 8 (C-13/C-14) closed — config.py:86 flips composition_table_live False->True; _resolve_product_search_tier_and_composition (922-974) gates the table on mode==product_search AND composition_table_live, table maps exploratory->question_led (96), and the question_led renderer (1154-1171) emits shape, question.prompt, question.answers[>=2], demoted carousel, browse_all_link, and chat_affordance via the tier-affordance gate (1202). Tests added in test_graph_emit.py (TestGap1AndGap8: test_gap1_6th_edge_fallback_contains_no_products_block, test_gap8_exploratory_tier_renders_question_led_with_live_table) assert correct behavior; test_turn1_call_budget.py and test_config.py updated to match. constraint-compliance: C-15 (lbjson chips extended not replaced — else-branch at 1197-1201 preserves chips:[{...,facet}]), C-16 (lbx.no_preview intact — sentinel path 2380-2382 fires _serialize_no_preview_sentinel), C-17 (turn-2 question_led pivot — impl-report cites graph.py:2469-2474 + test_inherited_question_led_emits_change_the_question_pivot), C-18 (work_status sequence intact — _emit_work_status at 2311 unchanged; 530 tests incl. TestWorkStatusOrderingInvariant pass), C-19 (<=1 LLM call turn-1 — NO_PREVIEW path adds zero calls; three live runs show llm_call_count=1). The global composition_table_live=True flip does NOT alter shapeable/decisive/intractable behavior: the table maps each tier to its own composition (shapeable->refinement_chips_with_hatch, 95), verified by code and the guitar live run (tier=shapeable, composition=refinement_chips_with_hatch with switch active). impl-report ## Verification is present and non-degenerate (Exercised: three documented cache-MISS live SSE runs + unit coverage; Not exercised, and why: decisive/intractable live and turn-2-live with bounded reasons + unit-test substitutes). Unit suite re-run by validator: 530 passed in 1.06s.
